detail: Started a new manual reverse-engineering pass from documentation, API docs, and public headers without reading generated manual or test spec artifacts.
Inspected docs/API.md, Settings.md, Deployment.md, Streams.md, TLS.md, Execution.md, Versions.md, XDP.md, and public API declarations in src/inc/msquic.h.

Modeled requirements around library lifecycle, object handles, callback-driven execution, listeners, connections, streams, datagrams, TLS, settings, version negotiation, deployment, and platform extensions.
Manual product requirements were generated from codebase documentation and public API behavior.
